task: Design a Go service slice with API routing, persistence, cache, background jobs, unit tests, integration tests, and observability proof.
Implement a Next.js App Router product screen using existing shadcn/Tailwind patterns with server actions, cache behavior, accessibility, and performance evidence.
Create a launch campaign with positioning, channel strategy, funnel metrics, campaign QA, and post-launch measurement tied to product constraints.
Compare competitors, refine ICP, collect pricing signals, and label each claim as verified, inferred, or unknown before a GTM decision.
Run a policy-safe browser fleet workflow with profile isolation, session lease strategy, explicit waits, selector drift diagnostics, and one controlled failure path.
Build HTTP/API automation with official endpoint contracts, quota handling, 429 retry-backoff behavior, idempotency keys, and replay-safe evidence.
Operate cloud MMO automation with scheduler and queue boundaries, retry jitter, idempotent jobs, dead-letter handling, cost ceilings, and SLO signal mapping.
Compact a large failing command log while preserving raw-required traceback and assertion lines, raw path pointers, budget violations, and signal retention metrics.
